case_title: DENNIS COMPAGNA VS. AT & T CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMPAGNA, DENNIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COMPAGNA, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMPAGNA, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED JUN-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AT & T CORP.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT AT & T CORP.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMPAGNA, DENNIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AT & T CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF DENNIS COMPAGNA & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE DOMINIC REYES, MANAGER FOR DEFENDANT AT&T CORP. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AT & T CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
